scripts.benchmark:update-baseline: npm run benchmark:json -- > benchmarks/baseline.json && echo 'baseline.json updated'
scripts.build:docs: npm run build && cp packages/nape-js/dist/index.js docs/nape-js.esm.js && rm -f docs/chunk-*.js && cp packages/nape-js/dist/chunk-*.js docs/ && mkdir -p docs/serialization docs/replay && cp packages/nape-js/dist/serialization/index.js docs/serialization/index.js && cp packages/nape-js/dist/replay/index.js docs/replay/index.js && cp packages/nape-pixi/dist/index.js docs/nape-pixi.esm.js && cp packages/nape-js/llms.txt packages/nape-js/llms-full.txt docs/ && node scripts/stamp-docs.mjs && npm run build:typedoc
scripts.dev:pixi: npm run build -w @newkrok/nape-js && npm run dev -w @newkrok/nape-pixi
scripts.dev:multiplayer: npm run build && cp packages/nape-js/dist/index.js docs/nape-js.esm.js && rm -f docs/chunk-*.js && cp packages/nape-js/dist/chunk-*.js docs/ && mkdir -p docs/serialization docs/replay && cp packages/nape-js/dist/serialization/index.js docs/serialization/index.js && cp packages/nape-js/dist/replay/index.js docs/replay/index.js && cp packages/nape-pixi/dist/index.js docs/nape-pixi.esm.js && npx concurrently -k -n docs,server -c cyan,green "npx serve docs -l 5500" "cd server && PORT=3001 node index.js"
